subcodes.first_line: O spiritual friends! Now that the eventide draweth nigh and occupations have exceeded all bounds, His Honour Mírzá Táráz [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران معنوی حال که قریب عصر است و مشاغل بیش از حد و حصر جناب میرزا طراز با
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @happiness; joyfulness; joy and sorrow, @praise and encouragement
